product.name: CalmKids Night Soothe Aromatherapy Roll-On
product.category: Health & Household > Aromatherapy > Children's Sleep Aromatherapy
product.description: Lavender-chamomile roll-on to help create a calming bedtime environment. A simple, scent-based bedtime ritual tool for parents seeking predictable nighttime routines. Light, natural oils provide a calming aroma that toddlers associate with winding down. Parents apply to their own wrists or nearby linens -- no supplements needed.
features: Found in the baby care / bedtime routine section
